name: modelEvaluate
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.type !== 'classification' || output.result.perClass.every(p => Number.isFinite(p.precision) && Number.isFinite(p.recall) && Number.isFinite(p.f1) && Number.isFinite(p.support))

output.ok === false || output.result.type !== 'regression' || (Number.isFinite(output.result.mse) && Number.isFinite(output.result.rmse) && Number.isFinite(output.result.mae) && Number.isFinite(output.result.r2))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (component double-wrap { artifact: { data } } is peeled at dispatch). Auto-detects classification (≤20 string/int classes) vs regression. Classification returns type/samples/accuracy/avgF1/perClass[].{class,precision,recall,f1,support}/confusionMatrix — the EXACT fields MlActionPanel's eval card renders. Regression returns type/samples/mse/rmse/mae/r2. FAIL-CLOSED: a non-finite prediction/actual in the regression path is REJECTED (ok:false) so NaN never serializes as `null` into the rendered 'MSE null' card (fixed 2026-06-28).
